news.headline: UK's house prices rose by 0.2% (forecast was -0.1%, previous was 0.4%).
UK house prices rose 1.5% YoY, surpassing the 1.2% forecast and previous 1.3%.
Shiba Inu's burn rate skyrockets by 1393%, 301.68 million SHIB tokens removed from circulation, boosting price.
news.summary: In the past 24 hours, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), the world's second-largest memecoin, experienced a substantial increase in its burn rate. Approximately 301.68 million SHIB tokens were removed from circulation, marking a notable 1393% surge, as reported by the official burn tracker, Shibburn. Coin burning involves intentionally sending cryptocurrency tokens to an unusable wallet address to reduce their availability. This act aims to introduce scarcity and enhance the token's market value.

news.headline: Gensource Potash cancels admission of common shares from AIM, now exclusively tradable on TSXV. Shareholders affected.
news.summary: SASKATOON, SK & LONDON - Gensource Potash Corporation, trading under the symbol GSP on the TSX Venture Exchange, has officially announced the cancellation of the admission of its common shares to trade on the AIM in accordance with the London Stock Exchange rules. With this announcement, shareholders can now exclusively trade their common shares on the TSX Venture Exchange. The Company made this decision effective immediately.

news.headline: Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) reports The Phoenix Insurance Company sold 2,917,097 shares of the company.
news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on July 1, 2024, Max Stock Limited (TASE: MAXO) disclosed that on June 30, 2024, The Phoenix Insurance Company Ltd. conveyed to the company that they had sold 2,917,097 shares.

news.headline: Kalmar Corporation's Shareholders' Nomination Board composition announced with key figures undisclosed.
Voltalia and TAQA Arabia sign agreement at Egypt-EU Investment Conference 2024 for renewable energy & green hydrogen cluster in Egypt.
news.summary: Voltalia, a global renewable energy company listed on Euronext Paris with ISIN code FR0011995588, along with their partner TAQA Arabia, have recently entered into a framework agreement. This agreement was formalized during the Egypt-EU Investment Conference 2024 in Cairo on June 29 and 30. The conference saw key stakeholders from both Egypt and the EU coming together to discuss investment opportunities and foster collaboration. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing renewable energy efforts in the region, highlighting the growing importance of sustainable solutions.

news.headline: Exor's latest press release details progress of buyback program, offering insights on key figures.
BNB Chain adds new DeFi, AI, & Web3 gaming projects from June 23 to 30, expanding its ecosystem.
news.summary: From June 23 to June 30, BNB Chain unveiled a series of new projects focusing on DeFi, AI, and Web3 gaming. These initiatives were introduced in a bid to enhance the ecosystem of BNB Chain.

news.headline: Trinasolar and Universidad Politécnica de Madrid collaborate on solar research, signing a long-term agreement on June 26, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Madrid, it was reported that Trinasolar recently signed a significant long-term partnership deal with the Institute of Solar Energy at Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (IES-UPM) on June 26. This agreement marks a significant step in Trinasolar's ongoing collaboration with a prestigious institution in the solar energy sector.

news.headline: Accenture finalizes acquisition of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS in New York & Tokyo, including subsidiaries Open Stream and Neutral.
news.summary: In a recent business development, Accenture has finalized the acquisition of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS along with its affiliated companies, Open Stream and Neutral. This strategic move bolsters Accenture's portfolio and strengthens their market position. The acquisition includes all assets and resources of OPENSTREAM HOLDINGS and its subsidiaries.

news.headline: Juniper Research predicts 5.2bn global digital identity app installs by 2029, driven by remote onboarding, expected to increase by 126%.
news.summary: In Basingstoke, England, a recent study by Juniper Research revealed that the global digital identity app downloads are projected to increase by a significant 126%. This growth is primarily attributed to the remote onboarding of users.

news.headline: ENGWE unveils limited edition P20 Ace electric bike in tribute to 2024 Olympics, following popular P20 release in March.
news.summary: In Milan on July 1, 2024, ENGWE, a top electric bike brand, revealed the debut of the ENGWE P20 Ace Limited Edition. Following the success of the P20 from March, this special edition model is linked to the 2024 Olympics. It presents a unique design and advanced features, aligning with the athletic spirit of the Games.

news.headline: Dawn Health and Merck collaborate on digital solution for Growth Hormone Disorders (GHD).
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark on July 1, 2024, Dawn Health, a prominent digital health firm focused on patient-centered advancements, revealed a collaboration with the top pharmaceutical giant, Merck. Together, they are developing a digital remedy for Growth Hormone Disorders (GHD). This strategic partnership aims to address the needs of individuals with GHD, marking a significant step in leveraging technology to enhance healthcare. Stay tuned for updates on this innovative initiative.

news.headline: Register for MapleStory N pioneer test until July 7, test on July 24 for 10 days; NEXPACE's announcement in Abu Dhabi on July 1.
news.summary: NEXPACE has officially opened registration for their Pioneer Test until July 7, with testers to be chosen through a survey on their website. The testing phase will take place from July 24 for 10 days in Abu Dhabi, UAE, to assess the game's infrastructure and stability.

news.headline: Alm. Brand A/S to sell Energy & Marine business for DKK 1.6 billion to Norwegian insurer Gard in new agreement.
CRH completes acquisition of majority stake in Adbri, acquiring remaining 57% of shares not owned by Barro. #BuildingMaterials #NYC
news.summary: In New York, CRH plc (NYSE: CRH), a top supplier of building materials solutions, has successfully completed the Scheme of Arrangement with Barro Group to acquire Adbri Ltd. CRH now owns the remaining 57% of Adbri's ordinary shares not held by Barro. CRH (NYSE: CRH, LSE: CRH) is a key player in the industry, providing innovative building materials solutions.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 shares, now has 15 million in circulation, holding 3 million in treasury. Total voting rights remain the same.
news.summary: The stock market experienced a significant drop today, with the main index falling by over 500 points. This decrease wiped out more than $1 trillion in market value across various sectors. Analysts attribute this drop to concerns about rising inflation rates and uncertainty surrounding global economic policies. Investors are advised to closely monitor the situation and be cautious in their financial decisions amidst the current market volatility.

news.headline: Kalmar Board of Directors makes crucial decisions in meeting, setting the strategic course for the company.
TGS and PGS merger finalized, PGS shares to cease trading on 1 July 2024 as per announcement on 20 June 2024.
news.summary: Oslo, Norway - On July 1, 2024, it was indicated in a joint stock exchange disclosure that the merger between TGS ASA ("TGS") and PGS ASA ("PGS") is progressing. This follows a prior announcement on June 20, 2024, highlighting important dates for the completion of the merger.

news.headline: Aegon completes EUR 1.535 billion share buyback including EUR 1.5 billion for merger with a.s.r. and EUR 35 million for exec comp.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Aegon has successfully concluded a share buyback program amounting to EUR 1.535 billion. Out of this total, EUR 1.5 billion from the buyback is associated with the merger of Aegon the Netherlands and a.s.r. announced on July 6, 2023. Furthermore, an additional EUR 35 million was added to the buyback on April 9, 2024, specifically for senior management's share-based compensation plans.

news.headline: Voting rights under scrutiny as capital punishment cases increase by 35%.
Cumulative voting authorizations granted 736,500,000 shares, without specifying the source of the data.
Overall Voting Rights and Capital Amount
Teen fiction book "Hip Hop Charlie" by Sammy Nelson encourages young Christians to share God's word. Released by Xulon Press on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Xulon Press is showcasing a young adult fiction tale blending a creatively unique narrative with the theme of "Let me introduce you to my Jesus." Set in HIGH SPRINGS, Fla., the book by Author Sammy Nelson delivers Christian motivation to teen audiences through a captivating story. Released on July 1, 2024, this book aims to reach young readers with a message of faith, appealing to a wide audience with its engaging storytelling.

news.headline: Monster Energy athletes dominate X Games Ventura 2024 with Kevin Peraza, Jordan Godwin, and Lewis Mills sweeping BMX podium, and Tom Schaar winning Skateboard Vert gold.
news.summary: Monster Energy commends its BMX, Moto X, and skateboard athletes on their impressive showing at Day 1 of the X Games Ventura 2024. The event took place in VENTURA, California on July 1, 2024. The Summer X Games commenced with high spirits as the athletes showcased their talents. Monster Energy extended its congratulations to the participants in categories such as BMX, Moto X, and skateboarding on their outstanding performances on the first day of the competition.

news.headline: Nyxoah has recently submitted the last module in PMA process for Genio to US FDA.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a 5-year low of 4.5%. This decrease is a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the economy has added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding analysts' expectations. This strong job growth has been attributed to various sectors including healthcare, technology, and manufacturing. The labor force participation rate has also increased to 62.5%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Overall, these statistics indicate a positive trend in the US job market with promising opportunities for job seekers.

news.headline: Bedford Metals finishes satellite survey at Ubiquity Lake, identifying uranium markers methane and helium, enhancing exploration confidence.
news.summary: Bedford Metals has recently wrapped up a satellite survey at Ubiquity Lake, where key indicators of uranium presence such as methane and helium have been discovered. This finding has significantly heightened optimism for forthcoming exploration endeavors. The aerial assessment conducted by Bedford Metals provided valuable insights, showcasing the presence of important markers for uranium deposits. This positive development emphasizes the potential for successful uranium exploration at Ubiquity Lake.

news.headline: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc declares quarterly dividend of 14 cents per share.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc declared a quarterly dividend of 14 US cents per share. The company, listed on NYSE American as CMCL, AIM as CMCL, and VFEX as CMCL, is excited about this announcement made by the board of directors.

news.headline: Mesoblast to file BLA for Ryoncil® FDA approval for treating SR-aGVHD in children next week.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, Mesoblast Limited, a leading provider of allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory conditions, announced plans to submit its Biologics License Application (BLA) for Ryoncil® (remestemcel-L) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) next week. This application seeks approval for treating children with steroid-refractory acute graft versus host disease (SR-aGVHD). Mesoblast Limited is identified as Nasdaq:MESO and ASX:MSB.

news.headline: Jyske Bank initiates a share repurchase program from June 3, 2024, to Jan 31, 2025, to acquire shares worth up to DKK 1.5 billion.
news.summary: Beginning on June 3, 2024, and concluding on January 31, 2025, Jyske Bank will execute a share repurchase program. During this timeframe, the bank plans to purchase shares worth a maximum of DKK 1.5 billion, as outlined in Corporate Announcement No. 12/2024 released on May 7, 2024. This repurchase initiative adheres to the regulations of EU Commission Regulation No. 596/2014 from April 16, 2014, commonly referred to as the "Market Abuse Regulation."

news.headline: Boeing acquires Spirit Aerosystems for $4.7B in deal.
Sword Group acquires 2 companies in Scotland: IACS (CyberSecurity specialist) and AAA (AI company)
news.summary: The group has announced strategic acquisitions of two companies in Scotland. The first is IACS, a cybersecurity specialist located in Aberdeen, and the second is AAA, an Aberdeen-based company specializing in artificial intelligence. These acquisitions will enhance the group's portfolio and presence in these advanced technology sectors.

news.headline: Wendel partners with Providence to back Globeducate, a top K-12 education group, in its growth phase.
news.summary: Wendel has partnered with Providence to provide support for Globeducate, a prominent global K-12 education organization, during its upcoming expansion stage. Globeducate, which operates in numerous countries, will benefit from this collaboration as it continues to grow and evolve.

news.headline: CPC membership reaches 99.185 million, showing strong growth and resilience.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the resilient Communist Party of China (CPC), which is 103 years old, displayed its strength with a total of 99.185 million members. This data was released a day prior to the party's 103rd founding anniversary, showcasing the robust growth and stability of the organization.

news.headline: EMGS secures prefunding for multi-client acquisition in Norway's Barents Sea.
news.summary: EMGS has signed a prefunding agreement for multi-client acquisition in the Barents Sea.

news.headline: Company SE to buy back own shares on June 28, 2024.
OSE Immunotherapeutics published preclinical efficacy results on Lusvertikimab in Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia in 'Blood'.
news.summary: OSE Immunotherapeutics has recently published preclinical efficacy results in the journal 'Blood' demonstrating the effectiveness of Lusvertikimab in treating Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia. This novel treatment showed promising results in preclinical studies, further supporting its potential in combatting this type of cancer. The publication signifies a significant step forward in the development of Lusvertikimab, bringing hope to patients and healthcare professionals. This advancement marks a milestone in cancer research and reinforces the importance of ongoing studies to validate the efficacy and safety of this innovative therapy.

news.headline: XRP Healthcare introduces initiative to support HIV/AIDS patients with increased access to Prescription Savings Card.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on July 1, 2024, XRP Healthcare revealed a new program to aid those with HIV and AIDS. The initiative seeks to enhance access to the XRP Healthcare Prescription Savings Card by implementing promotional and marketing efforts. This initiative is designed to reach a larger audience and assist in providing support to individuals facing these health challenges.

news.headline: BW LPG Limited has successfully completed its redomiciliation to Singapore after a court hearing in Bermuda. Ticker codes: BWLPG.OL, BWLP.
news.summary: In Singapore, BW LPG Limited ("BW LPG"), listed on OSE as "BWLPG.OL" and NYSE as "BWLP," announced a court hearing dated June 21, 2024. During this hearing, the Supreme Court of Bermuda gave its approval (Sanction Hearing) to the scheme of arrangement (the "Scheme") between BW LPG and its shareholders under Section 99 of the Bermuda Companies Act 1981. This approval was essential for the Company to proceed with the planned arrangement.

news.headline: New game by Binance offers users chance to win Binance Points, BNB token vouchers, and fee rebates. #Crypto #Incentives
news.summary: A new game titled 'Word of the Day' has been introduced by Binance, where participants have the opportunity to win rewards including Binance Points, vouchers for BNB tokens, and rebates on trading fees. Join in to test your skills and potentially earn these prizes.

news.headline: High Bitcoin price fluctuations expected in July as traders watch US economy closely amid uncertainty over Fed policy and inflation.
news.summary: Bitcoin may experience fluctuating trading patterns in the month of July due to uncertainties surrounding US Federal Reserve policy, economic performance, and inflation. These factors could lead to increased volatility in the market.

news.headline: NFT sales dropped 44% with crypto decline; meme coins surged in Q2. PolitiFi and animal-themed coins gained popularity.
news.summary: In the second quarter, numerous PolitFi and animal-themed cryptocurrencies experienced significant surges in value, defying the overall market downturn that also impacted NFTs.

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes and Mistral AI join forces to offer AI solutions for industries, aiming to accelerate the Generative Economy.
news.summary: Dassault Systèmes (Euronext Paris: FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA) and Mistral AI have joined forces to introduce advanced AI solutions to various industries, fostering innovation in a secure setting. With over 40 years of experience, Dassault Systèmes has been a leader in enabling advancements in manufacturing, life sciences, healthcare, and urban development. As we move into the Generative Economy era, industries are tasked with transitioning towards integrating cutting-edge AI technologies to drive progress.

news.headline: Elliptic Labs expands contract with Oppo for future smartphone launches in Oslo, Norway. #AIVirtualProximitySensor.
news.summary: Norwegian company Elliptic Labs has recently announced a significant development in their partnership with Oppo. The firm has secured an expansion contract for upcoming smartphone releases. This agreement signifies a promising venture between the companies, highlighting potential growth opportunities in the technology sector. The collaboration is expected to bring advanced features to Oppo's future smartphone models, with an emphasis on AI Virtual Proximity Sensor technology. This move showcases Elliptic Labs' innovative strides in the industry, which could lead to enhanced user experiences. The specific details of the agreement, including financial figures or timeline, have not been disclosed to the public.

news.headline: CTP leases 100,000 sqm in Hungary to auto logistics specialist, serving largest e-auto companies.
news.summary: In Budapest, Hungary, CTP, the largest listed developer, owner, and manager of industrial and logistics properties in Europe by gross lettable area, has secured a lease for over 100,000 sqm of logistics space in its business parks with a prominent Chinese logistics specialist serving the automotive industry. The tenant, catering to major e-automotive firms in Europe, will be utilizing new space and expanding within various CTParks in Hungary.

news.headline: Gunvor and Quercus to develop 3GW of solar capacity in Italy, marking Gunvor's move into solar sector.
news.summary: Gunvor Group ("Gunvor"), a prominent global energy commodities trading company, has formed a partnership with renewable energy specialist Quercus with the goal of building around 3 gigawatts (GW) of solar capacity. This collaboration signifies Gunvor's entry into the solar sector. The partnership was announced in London on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: ECW and AKF partner to enhance education for marginalized students in Afghanistan, Pakistan.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Education Cannot Wait (ECW) and the Aga Khan Foundation (AKF) revealed a new extended collaboration lasting three years. This partnership aims to enhance comprehensive educational quality for learners impacted by crises in Afghanistan and Pakistan. The initiative will focus on improving learning outcomes and environments to benefit a substantial number of individuals facing educational challenges in these regions.

news.headline: US FDA greenlights Pyzchiva® biosimilar (ustekinumab-ttwe) by Sandoz for commercialization.
Idorsia's JERAYGO (aprocitentan) approved in Europe as first ERA for resistant hypertension, dose: 12.5mg/day, can increase to 25mg.
news.summary: In Allschwil, Switzerland on July 1, 2024, Idorsia Ltd revealed that the European Commission (EC) has given the green light for JERAYGO™ (aprocitentan) for managing resistant hypertension in adults alongside at least three antihypertensive drugs. The approved dosage is 12.5 mg orally per day, with an option to raise it to 25 mg for patients who can handle the initial dose and require more stringent blood pressure (BP) regulation. This medication is identified as SIX: IDIA and offers a new treatment option for individuals dealing with challenging hypertension conditions.
